programme.title: Lawmen
programme.desc: While celebrating in an inebriated state a group of cattlemen inadvertently kill an old man in Bannock The righteous marshal of the town vows to punish them

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Adventures of Young Indiana Jones Adventures in the Secret Service
programme.desc: Its spy versus spy as Indy learns the ABCs of espionage on a trail from war-weary Austria to the heart of the Russian Revolution

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Invasion

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to the Prime Cut episode a group of recovering cannibals have a relapse and make the unfortunate decision to eat an intruder whos been contaminated with an alien disease

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Three pledges for a fraternity on probation run by a soft-spoken leader and his 2 sidekicks are visited by a beautiful young sorority gal whos looking for a frat to pledge her own sorority ends up tagging along with the pledges to an abandoned house where an urban legend murder took place years before Led by the obnoxious pledge master the trio of pledges must enter the house and pass each test given to them The question is ; will they survive

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Knight Knight
programme.desc: Stonetree is haunted after killing a young robbery suspect as Nick fights off a ghost from his past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A woman is driven to murder when her newborns cursed cradle seeks revenge

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Gomer 230
programme.desc: Gomer 230

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Luke writes an essay revealing a secret about Grampa

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Lukes recently married henpecked cousin Charlie and his wife come to visit

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS agents from all over are each carrying one piece of a bomb that is going to be used against a government base Max has to disarm it

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Hawaiian detective Harry Hoo and Max track his old nemesis The Claw to a San Francisco laundry

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: As the Hammelburg Underground lodges a complaint against Hogans success Klink finds himself caught between the Gestapo and the Wehrmacht each trying to take over Stalag 13

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt Schultz

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While mixing business with pleasure on an island plantation Parker must pose as a Frenchman in order to avoid capture while he reports details on a Japanese radio-jamming operation

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A mix-up with a dictating machine brings a big but poorly-timed Mothers Day surprise for Parker Gruber and Tinker

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.desc: Fortress

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Millionaire CJ Holmes is determined not to allow his daughter Suzy to marry farmer Fred Andrews When Suzy appeals to the Dukes for help CJs henchmen kidnap Uncle Jesse in a last-ditch effort to stop the wedding Jesse decides to teach the millionaire a lesson about the dedication and self-sacrifice of farmers

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Bombings begin at embassies and Liam believes they may reignite the SI Sino-Indian War which ended with an armistice several years before An old intelligence agency friend of Renees has interesting holographic technology

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Debi is caught up in a fight simulation developed by the aliens to study human creativity

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Rowan who claims that she and Will were married in a previous life before she was burned as a witch finds herself accused of murder Can she find her true self before the angry mob takes the law into their own hands

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When one of Dr Arcanes experiments is inexplicably ruined Graham suspects poltergeists Arcane swiftly discovers the spirit of General Sunderland is haunting the swamp and has plans for revenge

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Dan Mateo one of Alphas botanists believes that he can increase their food supply by communicating telepathically with his plants After passing out during one of his electronic experiments Alpha seems to become haunted by a murderous and disfigured spirit

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked to winter in the north with a herd of cattle over the winter with two men until the owner returns One man quits and Cheyenne runs off the other one who is the foreman after he attacks a neighbors wife in her cabin

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A detective David Soul investigating a murder becomes convinced a suspect is indeed guilty; guest A Martinez

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollin and Barney are sent to investigate the case of a scientist who believes her dead husbands ghost is giving her orders on how to complete her important work

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An old Vaudevillian finds 9 one thousand dollar bills on the street He uses one to buy his friends drinks at a dive The next morning a private detective claims that the money was lost by a big time gambler and pressures him to give it back he does and discovers that the detective was a con man

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a man is arrested for possession of illegal pills he provides information that may help him at trial The information leads Friday and Gannon to a home used as a pill making factory and the detectives must try to locate the man running the factory

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble flees Los Angeles with a woman who loves him after checking out a lead on some one-armed man but Lt Gerard is right on their trail

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A handsome stranger saves Audras life during a horse stampede and she quickly becomes attached to him unaware of his involvement in a series of robberies in the Valley

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: During a fur trapping trip Cheyenne joins with old Hoot Hollister who plans to return to St Louis to marry his girlfriend While on a riverboat to St Louis he and Cheyenne get mixed up with a teacher and crooked gamblers

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. programme.desc: Computer calculations give Zartan Omega as the probable location of Audric This planet is covered with blue light from the red dwarf sun and grows only giant flowers Upon reaching it though they discover Monster Minds have set up a satellite

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
